name: get-readme
description: Extract the rendered README content from the current GitHub repository page.
execute: (() => { const article = document.querySelector('article.markdown-body'); if (!article) return { error: 'README not found on this page.' }; return { content: article.innerText, html: article.innerHTML }; })()

name: search-repo
description: Search for code, issues, or discussions within the current GitHub repository.

type.description: The type of search: 'code', 'issues', 'discussions'. Defaults to 'code'.

execute: (async () => { const owner = document.querySelector('a.url.fn')?.textContent?.trim(); const repo = document.querySelector('strong[itemprop="name"] a')?.textContent?.trim(); if (!owner || !repo) return { error: 'Could not determine repo owner or name.' }; const type = input.type || 'code'; const q = encodeURIComponent(input.query + ' repo:' + owner + '/' + repo); const url = 'https://github.com/search?q=' + q + '&type=' + type; window.location.href = url; return { navigatedTo: url }; })()
